en.about_title: The Team Behind HimawariDigi
en.about_subtitle: We are a collective of passionate engineers, designers, and strategists dedicated to building exceptional digital experiences.
en.about_mission_desc: To empower businesses with scalable, innovative, and user-centric digital solutions that drive real growth.
en.about_vision_desc: To be the leading force in digital transformation, setting new standards for technological excellence.
en.about_hero_desc: A passionate team of engineers, designers, and strategists based in Yogyakarta, Indonesia. We believe technology should empower businesses, not complicate them.
en.about_mission_full: To democratize access to world-class software development. We partner with businesses of all sizes — from ambitious startups to established enterprises — delivering solutions that are elegant, scalable, and built to last.
en.about_vision_full: To become Southeast Asia's most trusted software house — known for technical excellence, transparent collaboration, and products that genuinely move the needle for our clients' businesses.
en.about_val1_desc: Open communication, honest timelines, and clear pricing. No hidden surprises.
en.about_val2_desc: We don't ship "good enough." Every line of code is crafted with care and intention.
en.about_val3_desc: Your success is our success. We treat every project as if it were our own.
en.about_cta_desc: We're always looking for talented people and exciting projects. Reach out and let's create something amazing.

id.about_title: Orang-orang di Balik HimawariDigi
id.about_subtitle: Kami ini sekumpulan engineer, desainer, dan tukang atur strategi yang suka banget bikin pengalaman digital super keren buat Anda.
id.about_mission_desc: Bantu bisnis Anda makin maju dengan solusi digital inovatif yang fokus pada kemudahan pengguna.
id.about_vision_desc: Jadi garda terdepan buat transformasi digital, dan ciptain standar baru di dunia teknologi.
id.about_hero_desc: Tim engineer, desainer, dan pemikir strategi yang berpusat di Yogyakarta. Kami percaya teknologi itu ada buat mempermudah urusan bisnis, bukan malah bikin ribet.
id.about_mission_full: Membuka akses pengembangan software kelas dunia buat siapa saja. Kami siap jadi partner buat bisnis segala ukuran — dari startup yang baru merintis sampai perusahaan raksasa — buat bikin solusi yang elegan, cepat, dan tahan banting.
id.about_vision_full: Jadi software house paling dipercaya di Asia Tenggara — terkenal gara-gara kualitas teknis yang mantap, kerja bareng yang transparan, dan produk yang beneran ngasih dampak buat bisnis klien.
id.about_val1_desc: Komunikasi terbuka, jadwal yang jujur, dan harga yang jelas. Nggak ada biaya dadakan.
id.about_val2_desc: Kami nggak asal bikin barang yang "cukup jalan". Setiap baris kode dibikin penuh teliti biar kualitasnya maksimal.
id.about_val3_desc: Kesuksesan Anda = Kesuksesan kami. Kami merawat setiap proyek persis seperti produk kami sendiri.
id.about_cta_desc: Kami selalu terbuka sama proyek-proyek seru dan talenta jagoan. Sapa kami dan yuk bikin hal-hal keren!
